Figure 6. Visual results of our proposed method on multiple image restoration tasks from NTIRE 2026 test datasets.

Figure 3. RetinexDualV2 Overview. Based on retinex theory, it decomposes the UHD image into Reff and Leff and operates on them using 2 sub-networks: Physical-Grounded Scale Attentive MaMBA (PG-SAMBA), and Physical-Grounded Frequency Illumination Adaptor (PG-FIA), respectively. Both branches recieves guidance pm from the Task-Specific Physical Grounding Module (TS-PGM). Noting that each output from a different level has a convolution layer before it for processing, which wasn’t illustrated for simplicity.
